papers.title: BQC19: a Quebec COVID-19 biobank
papers.access_route: BQC19 data/sample access application at bqc19.ca; ethics approval required
papers.notes: n>6200 at publication; vaccinated subsets documented with vaccine type and dates; longitudinal plasma/serum; PBMC cryopreserved; multi-hospital Quebec consortium; COVID severity and outcomes annotated

papers.title: PlasCoV: a large Canadian COVID-19 convalescent plasma biobank with vaccinated donor subsets
papers.notes: n=15,502 donors; 86,000+ individual samples; vaccinated donors with vaccine type documented; convalescent plasma focus but serum also available; direct contact email published in paper

papers.title: LPCE Nice biobank: COVID-19 plasma, serum, and cellular biospecimens
papers.institution: LPCE / Universite Cote d'Azur / CHU Nice
papers.access_route: Collaboration with LPCE biobank, CHU Nice; IRB approval required; contact via corresponding author
papers.notes: K2EDTA plasma, serum, and buffy coat at -80C; French single-center COVID biobank; vaccinated subsets documented from 2021 onward; detailed clinical severity annotation

expected_retrievable_institutions: LPCE / Universite Cote d'Azur / CHU Nice
notes: Hema-Quebec/PlasCoV is the largest single collection (86K samples, 15K donors) with a published contact email for access. BQC19 provides longitudinal PBMC + plasma with the richest clinical annotation. LPCE Nice offers matched buffy coat + plasma from a European centre.
